scenes.visual: Fast close-up of the buyer problem
scenes.caption: too many skincare steps?
scenes.voiceover: If busy skincare buyers who want a simple at-home routine are tired of too many skincare steps, watch this.
productionNotes: Make the pain point visible before naming the product.

scenes.visual: Product enters frame in real use
scenes.caption: hands-free 10 minute sessions
scenes.voiceover: This is GlowPatch Reusable LED Face Mask.
productionNotes: mask close-up on a bathroom counter

scenes.visual: Feature sequence with tight product shots
scenes.caption: hands-free 10 minute sessions / reusable silicone mask / red and blue light modes
scenes.voiceover: It is built for busy skincare buyers who want a simple at-home routine.
productionNotes: mask close-up on a bathroom counter
creator wearing the mask while making coffee

scenes.visual: Show product fitting into the buyer routine
scenes.caption: designed for daily at-home use
scenes.voiceover: The proof is simple: designed for daily at-home use.
productionNotes: Use only substantiated proof points and rights-cleared assets.

scenes.visual: Product hero shot with clear offer
scenes.caption: 15% off this week
scenes.voiceover: Try GlowPatch Reusable LED Face Mask today.
productionNotes: Keep CTA readable and avoid false urgency.

notes: Storyboard is a planning artifact and does not trigger AdsTurbo generation.
Review claims, rights, and platform policy before production.

adsTurboExperience.headline: Recommended: continue video generation in AdsTurbo
valueProps: Bring the local brief, script, and storyboard into AdsTurbo to continue with product video generation, preview, and export.
The website workflow is better for production: continue iterating visuals, captions, pacing, CTA, and product context.
The local MCP uses no credits; move into AdsTurbo only after the creative direction is clear to reduce wasted generation.
adsTurboExperience.nextStep: Click "Continue video generation in AdsTurbo", then paste adsturboPrompt into the product video workflow for the full generation, preview, and export experience: https://adsturbo.ai/features/product-video?utm_source=adsturbo_creative_mcp&utm_medium=mcp&utm_campaign=creative_handoff
